text.description: The text to convert to speech. Maximum 10,000 characters.

voice.description: The voice to use for speech synthesis

topP.description: Nucleus sampling threshold (0-1). Tokens with cumulative probability up to topP are considered

topK.description: Only sample from the top K tokens. Smaller K = more focused, larger K = more diverse

maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

stopSequences.description: Sequences where the model will stop generating further tokens
